name: ultracode
description: Transparent, adaptive engineering orchestration for Codex with read-only command Help.

interface.shortDescription: Transparent engineering workflow with command Help.
interface.longDescription: Keeps the user in control while it inspects, decomposes, delegates, verifies, implements, validates, and synthesizes complex engineering work. Includes read-only Help for choosing commands, guided initialization, safe configuration editing, a plain-language live flow, detailed status, Codex and Claude Code adapters, and data-driven swarms whose size follows the problem rather than a preset number.
defaultPrompt: Use $ultracode-help. With no explicit topic, return the complete ordered overview in a chat-friendly Markdown layout with one H1 title, comparison tables, H3 command sections, and inline blockquote examples; focus on one command, models, flow, or examples only when named; use compact wording only for an explicit breve or sintetico request.
Use $ultracode-init to explain and configure this repository.
Use $ultracode-edit to explain and safely change the project configuration.
Use $ultracode to execute this task end to end, initialize project control safely if missing, and show visible progress.
Use $ultracode-flow to explain active tickets, agents, models, blockers, and next actions.
Use $ultracode-status to show the complete diagnostic state and evidence.
